What We Do

From a basic clean to a full restoration — we handle every pair with care and precision.

Standard Clean

Full exterior clean, lace deodorizing, and brush detailing. Perfect for regular maintenance and light dirt.

Premium Deep Clean

Stain treatment, midsole scrub, interior deodorizing, and full dry. For pairs that need serious attention.

Sole Restoration

Yellowed or cracked soles restored to near-original condition. We use professional-grade sole brighteners.

How It Works

Simple, fast, and transparent from drop-off to delivery.

01

Book Online

Fill out the form below or call directly. Tell us what your pair needs and we'll confirm your appointment.

02

Drop Off Your Kicks

Bring your kicks to us. We inspect them on arrival and send you a condition report before we start the work.

03

Pick Up Fresh

Most pairs are ready within 24–48 hours. We'll notify you when they're done and ready for pickup.

Book a Session

Tell us about your pair and we'll get you scheduled.
